textByHashes.2fdae7b0e78c750a6358811d8d1bbcd7101e1e55: Yes he told me. I've begun making your special gas mask, but I need some dwellberries to finish it.
textByHashes.7f86e0686bccbd61483996e1d38cbefb6ea544b0: The best place to look is in McGrubor's Wood, just west of Seers' Village.
textByHashes.94ddf045ee5ed0443b7013b628943d47a3f3b444: There we go, all done. While in West Ardougne you must wear this at all times, or you could catch the plague.
textByHashes.0b66ea71713532fad88e5cd759dc0233318ec167: I'll make a spare mask for you in case you lose that one. I'll hide it in the cupboard in case the mourners come looking.
textByHashes.cddd3d3dcebf6061ff9e9bb929b9d56b679e5a1d: Hello darling, I think Edmond had a good idea of how to get into West Ardougne, you should hear his idea.
textByHashes.b1095888cabd505ea94089e436e7d5932a57b989: Hello darling, how's that tunnel coming along?
textByHashes.8777e985db066e5ebffe579d3e81fff4d9587923: Well I'm sure you're quicker than Edmond.
textByHashes.38a15fe1b0b98e29957015dbed6bdfc8ee0f07aa: One of the mourners has been sniffing around asking questions about you and Edmond, you should keep an eye out for him.
textByHashes.0b5e2d501f81c397f83688ab9ec174edb1a93544: Also, don't forget about that spare gas mask if you need it. It's hidden in the cupboard.
textByHashes.82984ab794a8ef8b0977b4ad070a9e9468247f5b: Hi, have you managed to get through to West Ardougne?
textByHashes.0e9c791d9d6f0f50d207af0af8c21893f03368d5: Make sure you wear your mask while you're over there! I can't think of a worse way to die.
textByHashes.9285e7ada5eca9b3356d27e09b6869a6976537e9: Don't forget, I've got a spare one hidden in the cupboard if you need it.
textByHashes.ccef0c8864c8a2a3188a220fc91c6460b2000263: Is there anything else I can do to help?
textByHashes.fc4041a437e393727c86cdd7456b01a00cb8b5f5: That's the spirit, dear. Don't forget that there's a spare gas mask in the cupboard if you need one.
textByHashes.18c3987325042d9c4b9326b596b752979258307c: Yes. There should be one in the house somewhere. Let me know if you need anything else.
textByHashes.28cfef9f390455c65da3ca715cd0dccaf001bcb0: Thank you for rescuing my daughter! Elena has told me of your bravery in entering a house that could have been plague infected. I can't thank you enough!
textByHashes.2e9f538a1afc6d7d5dd6918d05245ea2671de983: Edmond tells me you're helping Elena again. Thank you so much.
textByHashes.b3e0311f0c4c8efb51434e30bf3d24a8e60f3216: Hmmm, well that shouldn't be too hard for me to do. Could you bring me some silk and some purple dye please?
textByHashes.24b66b834aea1321c821ab679f6be10c5b015c54: Well I can't make your tabard then.
textByHashes.cca9b8d8b19c76130b55fd4fb12353fa5a18cb82: Hello there. Do you have the silk and purple dye yet?
textByHashes.10618d4e6ee52604f53952e2d932557fd8889951: Thank you so much for helping Elena. It means so much to Edmond and I.
textByHashes.2667f807de1b492814f158c238a814f16014301c: Not too bad... I've just got some troubles on my mind...
textByHashes.9eb25a91c3c1662f058b32587175228520094069: Elena! They came and took her away!
textByHashes.e4caa087db00fce69fb957397eff74c513fbba88: I'm not sure... Speak to Edmond, he was there when they took her.
textByHashes.95a93291e72ad69314467b35dcab3a7487c6cfad: Not a problem. I still have enough materials to make another. Here you go.
